records.m_Talk_ENG: Our Father, Who art in heaven...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our Father, Who art in heaven...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our Father, Who art in heaven...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hallowed be... Thy name...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hallowed be... Thy name...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hallowed be... Thy name...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Yawn* I'm going to die of boredom.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Yawn* I'm going to die of boredom.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Yawn* I'm going to die of boredom.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That stupid snob. What the heck did I even do wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That stupid snob. What the heck did I even do wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That stupid snob. What the heck did I even do wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like this prayer is going to keep food on the table for me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like this prayer is going to keep food on the table for me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like this prayer is going to keep food on the table for me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Okay. No one's around, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Okay. No one's around, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Okay. No one's around, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, I guess this'll do to charge my violence...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, I guess this'll do to charge my violence...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, I guess this'll do to charge my violence...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
This thing I swiped from Nelson while she was fast asleep... I think it is called a smartphone
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
This thing I swiped from Nelson while she was fast asleep... I think it is called a smartphone
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
This thing I swiped from Nelson while she was fast asleep... I think it is called a smartphone
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't believe this tiny device allows me to watch movies even without a tape. The world has gotten so convenient these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't believe this tiny device allows me to watch movies even without a tape. The world has gotten so convenient these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't believe this tiny device allows me to watch movies even without a tape. The world has gotten so convenient these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: For a little Sister, you talk like an old soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For a little Sister, you talk like an old soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For a little Sister, you talk like an old soul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh? That voice...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh? That voice...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh? That voice...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Looper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase, Sister Looper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Smartphones existed before you were born. You merely didn't know about them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Smartphones existed before you were born. You merely didn't know about them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Smartphones existed before you were born. You merely didn't know about them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long have you been there, Specky Snob? Are you spying on me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long have you been there, Specky Snob? Are you spying on me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long have you been there, Specky Snob? Are you spying on me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Did I not say that I will turn you into a respectable Sister?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Did I not say that I will turn you into a respectable Sister?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Did I not say that I will turn you into a respectable Sister?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have figured out your every move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have figured out your every move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have figured out your every move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Well, you should say something if you're there. Creep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Well, you should say something if you're there. Creep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Well, you should say something if you're there. Creep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like spying on people? What a terrible hobby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like spying on people? What a terrible hobby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like spying on people? What a terrible hobby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How odd of you to say that when you are the one with the horrific hobby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How odd of you to say that when you are the one with the horrific hobby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How odd of you to say that when you are the one with the horrific hobby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Hey, what are you doing? Give it back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Hey, what are you doing? Give it back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Hey, what are you doing? Give it back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will confiscate this blasphemous video.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will confiscate this blasphemous video.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will confiscate this blasphemous video.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you do not memorize the entire prayer by today, perhaps you might never get it back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you do not memorize the entire prayer by today, perhaps you might never get it back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you do not memorize the entire prayer by today, perhaps you might never get it back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grr...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grr...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grr...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The priest evaluation included basic knowledge appropriate for one's age.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The priest evaluation included basic knowledge appropriate for one's age.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The priest evaluation included basic knowledge appropriate for one's age.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thus, I will be teaching you mathematics today...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, I will be teaching you mathematics today...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, I will be teaching you mathematics today...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I am sure that even you can memorize the multiplication tables, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I am sure that even you can memorize the multiplication tables, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I am sure that even you can memorize the multiplication tables, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Snob. Are you saying that I'm stupid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Snob. Are you saying that I'm stupid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Snob. Are you saying that I'm stupid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nelson already taught me the multiplication tables!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nelson already taught me the multiplication tables!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nelson already taught me the multiplication tables!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what is four times six?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what is four times six?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what is four times six?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see. Since it's four, I'll hold up four fingers, and... One... two...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see. Since it's four, I'll hold up four fingers, and... One... two...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see. Since it's four, I'll hold up four fingers, and... One... two...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I don't have enough fingers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? I don't have enough fingers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I don't have enough fingers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I expected this much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I expected this much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I expected this much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, please look over here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, please look over here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, please look over here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, here are zombies that you like so much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, here are zombies that you like so much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, here are zombies that you like so much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh, zombies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh, zombies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh, zombies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You call that a zombie? You're such a bad drawer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You call that a zombie? You're such a bad drawer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You call that a zombie? You're such a bad drawer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Silence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Silence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Silence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you can see, each zombie has two arms and legs. Equaling to four limbs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you can see, each zombie has two arms and legs. Equaling to four limbs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you can see, each zombie has two arms and legs. Equaling to four limbs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if the total number of zombies is six, how many limbs will there be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if the total number of zombies is six, how many limbs will there be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if the total number of zombies is six, how many limbs will there be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It's six sets of four...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It's six sets of four...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It's six sets of four...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, it'll be twenty-four.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, it'll be twenty-four.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, it'll be twenty-four.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you get it now? This is multiplication.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you get it now? This is multiplication.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you get it now? This is multiplication.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. This is easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. This is easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. This is easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, another eight zombies appeared out of nowhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, another eight zombies appeared out of nowhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, another eight zombies appeared out of nowhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are more? Where did they come from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are more? Where did they come from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are more? Where did they come from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is not important. What is important is that, now, there are fourteen zombies in total.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is not important. What is important is that, now, there are fourteen zombies in total.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is not important. What is important is that, now, there are fourteen zombies in total.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, what is the total number of zombie limbs?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, what is the total number of zombie limbs?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, what is the total number of zombie limbs?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lemme think... Ten zombies plus four more...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lemme think... Ten zombies plus four more...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lemme think... Ten zombies plus four more...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure, but roughly around fifty...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure, but roughly around fifty...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure, but roughly around fifty...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Four times fourteen is fifty-six. Keep in mind that there is no such thing as "roughly" in mathematics.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Four times fourteen is fifty-six. Keep in mind that there is no such thing as "roughly" in mathematics.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Four times fourteen is fifty-six. Keep in mind that there is no such thing as "roughly" in mathematics.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fifty-six? What do you mean? There's no way that's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fifty-six? What do you mean? There's no way that's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fifty-six? What do you mean? There's no way that's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Excuse me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Excuse me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Excuse me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft. You acted so haughty but you're the one who doesn't know anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft. You acted so haughty but you're the one who doesn't know anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft. You acted so haughty but you're the one who doesn't know anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up. With fourteen zombies gathered in one place, how can all their limbs be all intact?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up. With fourteen zombies gathered in one place, how can all their limbs be all intact?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up. With fourteen zombies gathered in one place, how can all their limbs be all intact?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me you haven't even seen Daylight of the Dead. How uncultured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me you haven't even seen Daylight of the Dead. How uncultured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me you haven't even seen Daylight of the Dead. How uncultured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the last step in the priest evaluation, you will be tested on your combat skills as an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the last step in the priest evaluation, you will be tested on your combat skills as an Inquisitorial Priest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the last step in the priest evaluation, you will be tested on your combat skills as an Inquisitorial Priest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe I do not have to explain this part any further.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe I do not have to explain this part any further.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe I do not have to explain this part any further.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need. Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need. Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need. Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today's the day I flatten that snobby look off your face.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today's the day I flatten that snobby look off your face.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today's the day I flatten that snobby look off your face.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha. How coincidental. I have longed for this day to come, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha. How coincidental. I have longed for this day to come, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha. How coincidental. I have longed for this day to come, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For it will be my chance to legally fix those despicable manners of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For it will be my chance to legally fix those despicable manners of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For it will be my chance to legally fix those despicable manners of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you nagged me all day because I didn't memorize a stupid prayer...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you nagged me all day because I didn't memorize a stupid prayer...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you nagged me all day because I didn't memorize a stupid prayer...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You made me write lines to fill an entire piece of paper for messing up a dictation, and even flicked me on the head for not memorizing the times tables...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made me write lines to fill an entire piece of paper for messing up a dictation, and even flicked me on the head for not memorizing the times tables...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made me write lines to fill an entire piece of paper for messing up a dictation, and even flicked me on the head for not memorizing the times tables...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's called child abuse. Shouldn't a priest know better?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's called child abuse. Shouldn't a priest know better?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's called child abuse. Shouldn't a priest know better?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You made thirty-two attempts to break the study doors and escape...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made thirty-two attempts to break the study doors and escape...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made thirty-two attempts to break the study doors and escape...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is approximated that you damaged twenty-five old books just so you could doodle and fold paper airplanes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is approximated that you damaged twenty-five old books just so you could doodle and fold paper airplanes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is approximated that you damaged twenty-five old books just so you could doodle and fold paper airplanes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Child abuse? If you had told me it was animal abuse, I would have pleaded guilty of that crime and confessed my sins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Child abuse? If you had told me it was animal abuse, I would have pleaded guilty of that crime and confessed my sins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Child abuse? If you had told me it was animal abuse, I would have pleaded guilty of that crime and confessed my sins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your learning ability is worse than that of a monkey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your learning ability is worse than that of a monkey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your learning ability is worse than that of a monkey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A monkey?! Did you just call me a monkey?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A monkey?! Did you just call me a monkey?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A monkey?! Did you just call me a monkey?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I said you were less than a monkey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I said you were less than a monkey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I said you were less than a monkey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: U-um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: U-um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: U-um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could both of you please calm down?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could both of you please calm down?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could both of you please calm down?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is just a training session after all. So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is just a training session after all. So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is just a training session after all. So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a training session, you say...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a training session, you say...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just a training session, you say...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase. This is more than "just a training session", Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase. This is more than "just a training session", Sister Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase. This is more than "just a training session", Sister Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a fair and legal disciplinary process... that Sister Looper must go through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a fair and legal disciplinary process... that Sister Looper must go through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a fair and legal disciplinary process... that Sister Looper must go through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-it doesn't look like that to me... Your eyes are practically radiating hostility...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-it doesn't look like that to me... Your eyes are practically radiating hostility...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-it doesn't look like that to me... Your eyes are practically radiating hostility...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You stay out of this, Nelson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You stay out of this, Nelson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You stay out of this, Nelson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If not today, when will I get the chance to give that stuck-up a good smack on her butt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If not today, when will I get the chance to give that stuck-up a good smack on her butt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If not today, when will I get the chance to give that stuck-up a good smack on her butt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-butt...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-butt...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-butt...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! Very well. I admire your spirit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! Very well. I admire your spirit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! Very well. I admire your spirit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I won't hold back even if you cry and beg me later!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I won't hold back even if you cry and beg me later!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I won't hold back even if you cry and beg me later!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is bad. What should I do...?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Thus, I will be teaching you mathematics today...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thus, I will be teaching you mathematics today...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I am sure that even you can memorize the multiplication tables, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I am sure that even you can memorize the multiplication tables, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I am sure that even you can memorize the multiplication tables, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Snob. Are you saying that I'm stupid?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Snob. Are you saying that I'm stupid?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Snob. Are you saying that I'm stupid?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nelson already taught me the multiplication tables!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nelson already taught me the multiplication tables!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nelson already taught me the multiplication tables!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what is four times six?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what is four times six?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what is four times six?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see. Since it's four, I'll hold up four fingers, and... One... two...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see. Since it's four, I'll hold up four fingers, and... One... two...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see. Since it's four, I'll hold up four fingers, and... One... two...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I don't have enough fingers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? I don't have enough fingers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I don't have enough fingers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I expected this much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I expected this much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I expected this much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sister Looper, please look over here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sister Looper, please look over here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sister Looper, please look over here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, here are zombies that you like so much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, here are zombies that you like so much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, here are zombies that you like so much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh, zombies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh, zombies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh, zombies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You call that a zombie? You're such a bad drawer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You call that a zombie? You're such a bad drawer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You call that a zombie? You're such a bad drawer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Silence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Silence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Silence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you can see, each zombie has two arms and legs. Equaling to four limbs.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you can see, each zombie has two arms and legs. Equaling to four limbs.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you can see, each zombie has two arms and legs. Equaling to four limbs.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, if the total number of zombies is six, how many limbs will there be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, if the total number of zombies is six, how many limbs will there be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, if the total number of zombies is six, how many limbs will there be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It's six sets of four...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It's six sets of four...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It's six sets of four...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, it'll be twenty-four.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, it'll be twenty-four.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, it'll be twenty-four.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you get it now? This is multiplication.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you get it now? This is multiplication.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you get it now? This is multiplication.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. This is easy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. This is easy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. This is easy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now, another eight zombies appeared out of nowhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now, another eight zombies appeared out of nowhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now, another eight zombies appeared out of nowhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are more? Where did they come from?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are more? Where did they come from?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are more? Where did they come from?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is not important. What is important is that, now, there are fourteen zombies in total.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is not important. What is important is that, now, there are fourteen zombies in total.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is not important. What is important is that, now, there are fourteen zombies in total.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, what is the total number of zombie limbs?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, what is the total number of zombie limbs?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, what is the total number of zombie limbs?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lemme think... Ten zombies plus four more...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lemme think... Ten zombies plus four more...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lemme think... Ten zombies plus four more...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure, but roughly around fifty...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure, but roughly around fifty...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure, but roughly around fifty...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Four times fourteen is fifty-six. Keep in mind that there is no such thing as "roughly" in mathematics.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Four times fourteen is fifty-six. Keep in mind that there is no such thing as "roughly" in mathematics.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Four times fourteen is fifty-six. Keep in mind that there is no such thing as "roughly" in mathematics.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fifty-six? What do you mean? There's no way that's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fifty-six? What do you mean? There's no way that's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fifty-six? What do you mean? There's no way that's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Excuse me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Excuse me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Excuse me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft. You acted so haughty but you're the one who doesn't know anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft. You acted so haughty but you're the one who doesn't know anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft. You acted so haughty but you're the one who doesn't know anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up. With fourteen zombies gathered in one place, how can all their limbs be all intact?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up. With fourteen zombies gathered in one place, how can all their limbs be all intact?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up. With fourteen zombies gathered in one place, how can all their limbs be all intact?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me you haven't even seen Daylight of the Dead. How uncultured.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me you haven't even seen Daylight of the Dead. How uncultured.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me you haven't even seen Daylight of the Dead. How uncultured.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the last step in the priest evaluation, you will be tested on your combat skills as an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the last step in the priest evaluation, you will be tested on your combat skills as an Inquisitorial Priest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the last step in the priest evaluation, you will be tested on your combat skills as an Inquisitorial Priest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe I do not have to explain this part any further.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe I do not have to explain this part any further.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe I do not have to explain this part any further.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need. Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need. Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need. Do you know how long I've waited for this moment?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today's the day I flatten that snobby look off your face.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today's the day I flatten that snobby look off your face.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today's the day I flatten that snobby look off your face.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha. How coincidental. I have longed for this day to come, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha. How coincidental. I have longed for this day to come, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha. How coincidental. I have longed for this day to come, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For it will be my chance to legally fix those despicable manners of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For it will be my chance to legally fix those despicable manners of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For it will be my chance to legally fix those despicable manners of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you nagged me all day because I didn't memorize a stupid prayer...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you nagged me all day because I didn't memorize a stupid prayer...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you nagged me all day because I didn't memorize a stupid prayer...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You made me write lines to fill an entire piece of paper for messing up a dictation, and even flicked me on the head for not memorizing the times tables...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You made me write lines to fill an entire piece of paper for messing up a dictation, and even flicked me on the head for not memorizing the times tables...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You made me write lines to fill an entire piece of paper for messing up a dictation, and even flicked me on the head for not memorizing the times tables...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's called child abuse. Shouldn't a priest know better?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's called child abuse. Shouldn't a priest know better?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's called child abuse. Shouldn't a priest know better?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You made thirty-two attempts to break the study doors and escape...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You made thirty-two attempts to break the study doors and escape...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You made thirty-two attempts to break the study doors and escape...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is approximated that you damaged twenty-five old books just so you could doodle and fold paper airplanes...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is approximated that you damaged twenty-five old books just so you could doodle and fold paper airplanes...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is approximated that you damaged twenty-five old books just so you could doodle and fold paper airplanes...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Child abuse? If you had told me it was animal abuse, I would have pleaded guilty of that crime and confessed my sins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Child abuse? If you had told me it was animal abuse, I would have pleaded guilty of that crime and confessed my sins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Child abuse? If you had told me it was animal abuse, I would have pleaded guilty of that crime and confessed my sins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your learning ability is worse than that of a monkey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your learning ability is worse than that of a monkey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your learning ability is worse than that of a monkey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A monkey?! Did you just call me a monkey?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A monkey?! Did you just call me a monkey?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A monkey?! Did you just call me a monkey?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I said you were less than a monkey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I said you were less than a monkey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I said you were less than a monkey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: U-um...
root.m_Talk_DEU: U-um...
root.m_Talk_FRA: U-um...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could both of you please calm down?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could both of you please calm down?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could both of you please calm down?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is just a training session after all. So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is just a training session after all. So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is just a training session after all. So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just a training session, you say...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just a training session, you say...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just a training session, you say...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would be more than happy to rephrase. This is more than "just a training session", Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would be more than happy to rephrase. This is more than "just a training session", Sister Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would be more than happy to rephrase. This is more than "just a training session", Sister Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a fair and legal disciplinary process... that Sister Looper must go through.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a fair and legal disciplinary process... that Sister Looper must go through.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a fair and legal disciplinary process... that Sister Looper must go through.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-it doesn't look like that to me... Your eyes are practically radiating hostility...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-it doesn't look like that to me... Your eyes are practically radiating hostility...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-it doesn't look like that to me... Your eyes are practically radiating hostility...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You stay out of this, Nelson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You stay out of this, Nelson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You stay out of this, Nelson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If not today, when will I get the chance to give that stuck-up a good smack on her butt?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If not today, when will I get the chance to give that stuck-up a good smack on her butt?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If not today, when will I get the chance to give that stuck-up a good smack on her butt?

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-butt...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-butt...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-butt...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem! Very well. I admire your spirit.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem! Very well. I admire your spirit.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem! Very well. I admire your spirit.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! I won't hold back even if you cry and beg me later!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! I won't hold back even if you cry and beg me later!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! I won't hold back even if you cry and beg me later!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha, haha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ha, haha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ha, haha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is bad. What should I do...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is bad. What should I do...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is bad. What should I do...?
